text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I know I said I didn't mind feeling some pressure...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But don't you think this race is a little much? I
mean...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Here come today's racers. First, we have Mejiro
Ryan. Next, the glass princess who runs
unwaveringly despite her frail condition, Mejiro
Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
They're here today to represent the Mejiro family,
but we have another Umamusume to look out for
as well.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Presenting the superstar racer who built a new
era...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
That's right, it's Oguri Cap! She hasn't quite been
herself her past few races, but I wonder what kind
of run we'll see from her today!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: C'mon, Oguri! We're counting on you!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Don't push yourself anymore... Just take the day
to rest...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(Whoa... What's going on? It's like a mess of pure
hope mixed with pure sympathy.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (Can she even run in this confused atmosphere?)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
What in the world kinda vibes is she bringing with
her today? I'm so lost...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Well, I guess I'll just have to see how someone at
the top runs for myself!
